title: poa scabrifolia
intro: Poa scabrifolia, a type of grass native to China, is a plant species that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa scabrifolia include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The herbal preparations of Poa scabrifolia include tea, tincture, and powder, which can be consumed internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
